name: DynaVap - Wand Adaptor
summary: Optimise your DynaVap experience with the DynaVap Wand Adaptor.
description: Optimise your DynaVap experience with the DynaVap Wand Adaptor. This efficient accessory enables effortless placement of your device into the Wand heating ring, eliminating the need for swirling or finding the perfect angle. Prepare to experience your vaporiser within seconds. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
